sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Leitung mit tawh mel kamuh loh hang
Vanglian Pa khut in paai bang hong pom den
Naubang hong kepnate, ham bang hong huainate
A nop in nuam semsem Hallelujah.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Leitung pilan bang mah neilo a
Lungmawl kei bang lel mimic bang hong tel
Sian aw na lenggah huan gia bang zun ka cimlo
Lau Kha sianghto tui bang hong dim den aw.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Tung solkhapi a mial zong, tung sunni mual a liam zong
Mualliam theilo kei nong itna, cinglo taklo
Tualniam ka nunna, a sangna lam hong kaito
Agape itna Pasian, na min pakbang kong twain
Zaila naubang hong awi awi ningh maw.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Patpuan hilo, nai puan hilo a
Jesu sisan tawh kizem puan silh tang
Lungin ka gel gel ciang hoih in a hih semsem
Anbang hong itna lian tumdang diak sang.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Na hehpihna tawh hih ciang kong tung
Mailam ka nunna hong zang toto aw
Lumbang hong sung den aw, Abraham bangin
Mite ading thupha hong hi sak aw.
